{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Stormcaller
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Uncrowned (novel)|Uncrowned]]
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Stormcaller]] is a member of the [[Cult of the Weeping Dragon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The parasite almost beat the [[Stormcaller]] on its own.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“It almost beat the Stormcaller on its own!”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
